# ADR-001: Referring Choice

## Context

Doctor needs a referrer whose target changed later.

## Decision

Reference the sibling decision.

## Consequences

The drift phase flags this artifact as suspect.

## Status

Accepted

## Related Decisions

- adr-002

# ADR-002: Moving Target Choice

## Context

Doctor needs a target committed after its referrer.

## Decision

Change in a later commit.

## Consequences

The referrer becomes suspect.

## Status

Accepted

# ADR-005: A Late Thing

## Context

Late context.

## Decision

Land late.

## Consequences

Late consequences.

## Status

Accepted

# Requirement: Late Capture

## Problem

Late artifacts need created dates of their own.

## Requirements

- [REQ-001] Late artifacts MUST carry their first-commit date.

## Success Metrics

Created differs from the seed commit.

---
schema_version: 1
id: RAC-AAAA1111AAAA
type: decision
---
# ADR-001: A Thing

## Context

The closure export cases need one live decision with a pinned canonical
identifier and a category.

## Decision

Keep a single Accepted, categorised decision at the head of the fixture.

## Consequences

The agent-rules projection carries a stable `RAC-` identifier line,
refreshed by a later commit.

## Status

Accepted

## Category

Architecture

setup.content:
# ADR-006: Uncommitted

## Context

Never committed.

## Decision

Stay out of git history.

## Consequences

No created or updated dates.

## Status

Accepted

# ADR-100: Sole Artifact

## Context

One artifact pins the singular index noun.

## Decision

Keep exactly one.

## Consequences

The index reads 1 artifact.

## Status

Accepted
just a file

# ADR-009: Collides

## Context

A typed artifact at index.md collides with the bundle entry point.

## Decision

Keep it to pin the uncaught-collision exit.

## Consequences

The export refuses before writing anything.

## Status

Accepted

# REQ-001: Fast Search

## Problem

Search is slow today.

## Requirements

- [REQ-001] The system must return results within 200 ms.
- [REQ-002] The importer shall accept CSV files.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Results return in under 200 ms.

## Success Metrics

- p95 latency below 200 ms.

## Risks

- Cache misses hurt latency.
